cleavage agent: by tryptic PMF of gel slices
collision energy: the normalized collision energy was 27 eV
fractionation method: The isolation method of Percoll gradient centrifugation was based on the method of Kubis et al.
instrument: LC–MS/MS analysis was carried out using the Q Exactive Plus mass spectrometer
ionization type: The sample was atomized using the nanoESI source
